Seung J. Kim (skim823@uwo.ca)

library(clusterProfiler)
## 
## clusterProfiler v4.14.6 Learn more at https://yulab-smu.top/contribution-knowledge-mining/
## 
## Please cite:
## 
## G Yu. Thirteen years of clusterProfiler. The Innovation. 2024,
## 5(6):100722
## 
## Attaching package: 'clusterProfiler'
## The following object is masked from 'package:IRanges':
## 
##     slice
## The following object is masked from 'package:S4Vectors':
## 
##     rename
## The following object is masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
## Loading required package: AnnotationDbi
## 
## Attaching package: 'AnnotationDbi'
## The following object is masked from 'package:clusterProfiler':
## 
##     select
## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     select
## 
library(viridis)
## Loading required package: viridisLite
up_genes_list <- list() # to store upregulated gene names
up_list <- list() # to store OR gene sets

# Apply over all names in res_list
enrichgo_loop <- function(name){
  r <- res_list[[name]]
  
  # Logical vector to find valid rows
  valid_up <- which(!is.na(r$padj) & !is.na(r$log2FoldChange) & 
                      r$padj < 0.05 & r$log2FoldChange > 1)
  
  up_genes_list[[name]] <- rownames(r)[valid_up]
  
  
  # Run enrichment analysis
  enrich_res <- enrichGO(gene = up_genes_list[[name]],
                         OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                         ont = "BP",
                         keyType = "SYMBOL")
  
  return(enrich_res)
}

up_list <- lapply(names(res_list), enrichgo_loop)
# Optionally name the results
names(up_list) <- names(res_list)



# Merge the simplified results
merged_up_result <- merge_result(rev(list(
  #"ATI/Endo" = clusterProfiler::simplify(up_list[['ATI/Endo']], cutoff = 0.5),
  #"Alv. FB/immune" = simplify(up_list[['Alv. FB/immune']], cutoff = 0.5),
  "Plasma" = clusterProfiler::simplify(up_list[['Plasma']], cutoff = 0.5),
  "SMC" = clusterProfiler::simplify(up_list[['SMC']], cutoff = 0.5),
  "ATII" = clusterProfiler::simplify(up_list[['ATII']], cutoff = 0.5),
  "Immune" = clusterProfiler::simplify(up_list[['Immune']], cutoff = 0.5),
  "Airway" = clusterProfiler::simplify(up_list[['Airway']], cutoff = 0.5),
  "Adv. FB" = clusterProfiler::simplify(up_list[['Adv. FB']], cutoff = 0.5),
  "Perib. FB" = clusterProfiler::simplify(up_list[['Perib. FB']], cutoff = 0.5),
  "Alv. macro" = clusterProfiler::simplify(up_list[['Alv. macro']], cutoff = 0.5),
  "Macro" = clusterProfiler::simplify(up_list[['Macro']], cutoff = 0.5),
  "B" = clusterProfiler::simplify(up_list[['B']], cutoff = 0.5)
)))

# Dotplot
dotplot <- merged_up_result %>% enrichplot::dotplot(., showCategory=3)+
  scale_fill_viridis(limits=c(1e-105, 6e-2),
                       trans="log",
                       breaks=c(1e-100, 1e-50, 1e-20,  5e-2))+
  # scale_size_continuous(limits=c(1,15),
  #                       breaks=c(5,10,15))+
  # 
  # scale_x_continuous(
  #   labels=scales::number_format(accuracy=0.01))+
  scale_y_discrete(labels=function(x) str_wrap(x,width=75))+
  scale_x_discrete(labels=function(x) gsub("\\s*\\([^\\)]+\\)","",x))+
  xlab("Niches")+
  ylab("GO terms")+
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour="black"),
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=14, family='sans',angle=40,hjust=1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=14, family='sans'),
    axis.title = element_text(size=14, family='sans'),
    text=element_text(size=14, family='sans'),
    legend.text=element_text(size=14, family='sans'),
    plot.margin=unit(c(0.1,0.1,0.1,0.2),"cm"),
    legend.position="left",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill="transparent"),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour="black"),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill="transparent"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill="transparent", colour=NA)
  )+
  coord_flip()+
  guides(fill=guide_colorbar(expression(Adj.~italic(P)~value),
                               order=1,
                               frame.colour="black",
                               ticks.colour="black",
                               frame.linewidth=0.5,
                               ticks.linewidth=0.5,
                               label.hjust=0,
                               label.vjust=0.5,
                               title.hjust=0.5,
                               # title = element_blank(),
                               title.position = "top",
                               title.theme = element_text(family='sans', size=14),
                               label.theme = element_text(family='sans', size=14)))
